LITTLEWIZARD-LITTLE_WIZARD.goldMonologue: Line spoken when obtaining a large amount of gold
LITTLEWIZARD-LITTLE_WIZARD.title: 小巫师
LITTLEWIZARD-LITTLE_WIZARD.cardsModifier: __ cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
LITTLEWIZARD-LITTLE_WIZARD.description:
因错误的仪式，强大的巫师被困在了轮回的诅咒中，每次死亡灵魂都会回到过去。
回归最基础的三元素魔法，于高塔中寻找解除诅咒的方法。
Co-op hurry up end turn ping message
